title: Trip Ideas Generator
description: Generates 4 unique trip proposals based on base city and current date — from a city date to a long vacation. Avoids tourist traps, focuses on atmospheric and off-the-beaten-path places.
author: jarkendar

additional_data.description: Today's date in DD.MM.YYYY format. Used to determine current season and plan ahead.
Base city for the trip proposals. Used as a starting point for all 4 trip types.
